chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-369 of 2021 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE. For hearing of bail application. 06.09.2021 Mr. Nadeem Shahbaz Shar, Advocate for applicant. Haji Shams Rajper Advocate for complainant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, D.P.G for the State. *************** O R D E R Applicant Shahbaz Ali present on interim bail. Learned counsel for applicants files application for condonation of absence of applicant for last date of hearing which is granted. Through instant Crl. Bail application, applicant Shahbaz Ali son of Muhammad Ilyas seeks pre-arrest bail in Crime No.70 of 2021 registered at Police Station, Faiz Gunj under section 489-F, P.P.C. The applicant was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail by this Court subject to furnishing of solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR bond in the like amount vide order, dated 16.06.2021, now he seeks confirmation of the same. Briefly stated facts of the case are that on 18.05.2021, complainant Ali Asghar lodged the aforementioned F.I.R. alleging therein that he has business terms with applicant Shahbaz and some outstanding amount was against him for which he issued a cheque dated 25.04.2021 of Allied Bank Bhirya Road Branch, amounting to Rs.6,82,092/-, which was dishonored on presentation. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.50,000/- to Rs.6,82,092/- by the applicant, equivalent to cheque amount. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.6,32,092/- requests for the grant of One week time for furnishing additional surety.

Briefly stated facts of the case are that on 18.05.2021, complainant Ali Asghar lodged the aforementioned F.I.R. alleging therein that he has business terms with applicant Shahbaz and some outstanding amount was against him for which he issued a cheque dated 25.04.2021 of Allied Bank Bhirya Road Branch, amounting to Rs.6,82,092/-, which was dishonored on presentation. At the very outset, learned counsel for the complainant states that he has no objection for confirmation of interim pre-arrest bail subject to raising the bail amount from Rs.50,000/- to Rs.6,82,092/- by the applicant, equivalent to cheque amount. 2 Learned Counsel for applicant/accused while showing his willingness for furnishing additional surety of Rs.6,32,092/- requests for the grant of One week time for furnishing additional surety. Accordingly, the interim bail granted to applicant vide order dated 16.06.2021 is hereby confirmed by consent subject to his furnishing additional surety of Rs.6,32,092/- with fresh PR bond of Rs.6,82,092/- to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court within one weeks hereof. However, in case applicant fails to furnish additional surety within stipulated period, this Crl. Bail Application shall stands dismissed by recalling interim order dated 16.06.2021. Application stands disposed of in above terms. J U D G E Ihsan/*
